description:
This is my first problem:

This game was from the 5th round of my first tournament played in March 2006. For a clearer position and to reduce variations I have added some stones. The starting move is forced.

White (12k) gave me Black (15k) a 4-stone handicap. In the game Black screwed up at this point.

Can you do better (avoid ko) ?

The solution tree is rather big, so there may be some mistakes in the variations. The "Navigate Solution"-tree also contains some bad answers of White.

Have fun!
